name: grain-brain
description: David Perlmutter's Grain Brain — a revolutionary look at how grains, carbs, and sugar destroy brain health, and a protocol for protecting your brain through diet and lifestyle.
useCase: Understanding brain-diet connection, preventing cognitive decline, managing mental health through diet, reducing inflammation, eliminating gluten sensitivity, adopting a brain-healthy lifestyle.
knownRisks: Always consult a doctor before making significant dietary changes
The book's strong claims about gluten and grains are controversial — read critically
The Grain Brain protocol may not be suitable for everyone
